# Enrichment.Inference.Engine

> Universal domain-aware entity enrichment API for PlasticOS.
> Enriches CRM records (Odoo + Salesforce) with structured intelligence
> from Perplexity sonar-reasoning, normalized into material and facility profiles
> for high-accuracy buyer matching.

## Key Files

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Agent operating instructions and repo conventions
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md): System architecture, component map, data flow
- [GUARDRAILS.md](GUARDRAILS.md): AI safety constraints, prompt rules, field write policy
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Claude Code context and instructions

## Docs

- [TESTING.md](TESTING.md): Test strategy, coverage thresholds, fixture patterns
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution guide
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): Vulnerability disclosure policy
